---
title: "Post-Sequencing"
output: html_document
date: '2022-07-19'
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# LOAD LIBRARIES # 
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(tidyverse)
library(cowplot)
```

# IMPORT CONTIG COUNTS FILE #
```{r}
raw_contig_counts <- read.delim("Mote_Past_Counts_sf_merged.txt") 

```

# CONTIG SUM AND MEAN #
```{r}
top_contig_sum <- raw_contig_counts %>% 
  select(ContigName, read_sum) %>%
  filter(read_sum > 1380000)

top_contig_mean <- raw_contig_counts %>%
  select(ContigName, read_mean) %>%
  filter(read_mean > 9000) 

setdiff(top_contig_sum$ContigName, top_contig_mean$ContigName)

top30 <- top_contig_mean$ContigName
```

# DEDUPLICATED SUM AND MEAN # 
```{r}
raw_contig_counts_dedup <- read.delim('C:/Users/kpark/OneDrive/Documents/Barshis_Lab/2021-June_Mote/data/Sequencing/Porites_astreoides/Pilot_Fail_New_Concat_Compiled/Dedup_Mote_Past_Counts_full_cleannames.txt')
```

# DEDUP CONTIG SUM AND MEAN #
```{r}
top_contig_sum_dedup <- raw_contig_counts_dedup %>% 
  select(ContigName, read_sum_dedup = read_sum) %>%
  filter(read_sum_dedup > 584400)

top_contig_mean_dedup <- raw_contig_counts_dedup %>%
  select(ContigName, read_mean_dedup = read_mean) %>%
  filter(read_mean_dedup > 5380) 

setdiff(top_contig_sum_dedup$ContigName, top_contig_mean_dedup$ContigName)

top30_dedup <- top_contig_mean_dedup$ContigName

```

# COMPARE TOP 30s #
```{r}
setdiff(top30, top30_dedup)

setdiff(top30_dedup, top30)

a <- left_join(top_contig_sum, top_contig_mean)

b <- left_join(top_contig_mean_dedup, top_contig_sum_dedup) 

total_top_30 <- full_join(a,b)

```

# Highest DEGs #
```{r}
c1 <- read.delim('C:/Users/kpark/OneDrive/Documents/Barshis_Lab/2021-June_Mote/data/Sequencing/Porites_astreoides/Pilot_Fail_New_Concat_Compiled/DESeq_Contrasts/resOff_30_T5vOff_37_T5.txt')

c2 <- tibble::rownames_to_column(c1, "Contig_Name")

c3 <- c2 %>%
  filter(pvalue < 0.01)

ups <- c3 %>%
  filter(log2FoldChange > 7.45)

downs <- c3 %>%
  filter(log2FoldChange < -6.2)

setdiff(ups$Contig_Name, top30)

setdiff(ups$Contig_Name, top30_dedup)

setdiff(downs$Contig_Name, top30)

setdiff(downs$Contig_Name, top30_dedup)

setdiff(ups$Contig_Name, downs$Contig_Name)

```
